2269770.name: CallOfTree
2269770.description:
About This Game


a game to see the scenery
'CallOfTree' is a shooting game that requires a high-spec PC of a gamer made with Unreal Engine 5.
The difficulty level is very easy and the purpose of this game is to see beautiful scenery.
That's all the enemy is chasing wolves Until now
The story is about a gamer saving a world that was confused by the war of the gods.
First person/3rd person can be changed and stored on a level-by-level basis
One level has about 10 minutes of play time
It's a simple structure that gamers just have to follow the world that developers have created

I used the latest version 5.1 of Unreal Engine
I tried to add DLSS, but it was put on hold because the usage changed as the Unreal version was upgraded to 5.1
Developer computer's RTX3070 produces at least 30 frames and an average of 40 frames with the 2k High option.

total play time is about 10 minutes, which is very short
I will continue to update diligently
I'll make sure that the total play time is an hour before the end of 2023
